div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 247px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-mlflow
--action (sync-dataset,
log-results, push-feedback,
pull-feedback, all)
--config eval.yaml
--run-id (for log/push/pull)

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Verify MLflow
ensure_server() check
resolve tracking URI
(eval.yaml → env → default)
suggest /eval-setup if down

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Build Mapping
LLM interpretation
inputs vs expectations
file:field_path pairs
__file__ for whole files
write schema_mapping.json

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 133px; height: 1px; padding-top: 77px; margin-left: 977px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Run Sync
sync_dataset.py
validate mapping preview
sync records to MLflow
deduplicates on merge

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 193px; height: 1px; padding-top: 252px; margin-left: 682px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Log Results
log_results.py
params: skill, model, runner
metrics: judge scores,
cost, tokens, duration
artifacts: summary.yaml
table: per-case results
traces from stdout.log
tags: regressions, judges

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 168px; height: 1px; padding-top: 447px; margin-left: 682px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Push Feedback
attach_feedback.py
find execution traces
judge → CODE feedback
human → HUMAN feedback
skips if no traces exist

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 607px; margin-left: 682px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Pull Feedback
attach_feedback.py --pull
MLflow UI annotations
save to review.yaml
(mlflow_feedback section)
